arguments.query: Salesforce API developer documentation authentication OAuth2
Salesforce REST API developer access self-serve free trial
Salesforce MCP server AI agent toolkit
Salesforce developer edition free sign up API access site:developer.salesforce.com

Salesforce MCP server composio toolkit agent
Salesforce DX MCP server GitHub official Salesforce MCP

researched_category.notes: Salesforce is the world's leading CRM platform, providing sales, service, marketing, commerce, and analytics solutions.

one_liner.value: Cloud-based CRM platform with comprehensive REST/SOAP/GraphQL APIs for managing sales, service, marketing, and customer data, including native MCP support for AI agents.

methods.notes: OAuth 2.0 is the primary/recommended method. The REST API uses bearer tokens (access tokens) obtained via OAuth 2.0 flows. Also supports JWT bearer token flow, username-password flow, and client credentials flow.

access.notes: Free Developer Edition is available at developer.salesforce.com/signup with no credit card required and no expiration as long as it's active. The Developer Edition includes API access and now includes Agentforce and Data Cloud. Enterprise paid editions also include API access. No admin approval or sales contact needed for Developer Edition signup.

summary.value: Salesforce has a very broad, well-documented public REST API (plus SOAP, Bulk, Streaming, GraphQL, and Metadata APIs). The REST API covers CRUD on all sObjects, querying (SOQL), search, metadata management, Apex execution, and more. The API is versioned and has extensive documentation at developer.salesforce.com/docs.

agent_interface.notes: Salesforce provides official MCP support: (1) Hosted MCP Servers managed by Salesforce, (2) Salesforce DX MCP Server (@salesforce/mcp on npm, open source on GitHub). Composio also has a Salesforce MCP toolkit. The MCP servers support 60+ tools covering org management, metadata, data, users, and more.

rationale.value: Salesforce is fully buildable as an agent toolkit today. It has a comprehensive, well-documented public REST API, official OAuth 2.0 authentication, a free self-serve Developer Edition for testing, and official MCP servers (both hosted and DX MCP Server on GitHub). Multiple third-party toolkits (Composio, LangChain, etc.) already integrate Salesforce for AI agents. There are no material blockers for building an agent toolkit.

s1.quote: Salesforce is the #1 AI CRM, with AI agents, data, and CRM apps on a single, unified platform.
s1.title: Salesforce.com Homepage

s2.quote: REST API provides a powerful, convenient, and simple REST-based web services interface for interacting with Salesforce.
s2.title: REST API Developer Guide

s3.quote: To successfully send requests, REST API requires an access token obtained by authentication. ... These Quick Start examples use Salesforce CLI ... Use the access token (also known as a 'bearer token')
s3.title: Step Two: Set Up Authentication - REST API Developer Guide

s4.quote: Developer Edition provides a free and easy solution so that you can use Salesforce for testing and development. To sign up for a Developer Edition account, go to developer.salesforce.com/signup.
s4.title: Step One: Sign up for Salesforce Developer Edition

s5.quote: Sign up for your Developer Edition. A free Salesforce Platform environment with Agentforce and Data 360. No credit card required.
s5.title: Developer Edition Signup

s6.quote: The new Salesforce Developer Edition is here, now with Agentforce and Data Cloud ... a free, full-featured Salesforce environment that doesn't expire as long as you keep using it.
s6.title: Introducing the New Salesforce Developer Edition

s7.quote: Salesforce Hosted MCP Servers give AI agents a secure, governed way to interact with Salesforce data and automation. ... Per-user OAuth 2.0 with PKCE ensures that agents operate with appropriate permissions.
s7.title: Salesforce Hosted MCP Servers - Get Started

s8.quote: Connect REST API uses OAuth to securely identify your application before connecting to Salesforce.
s8.title: OAuth and Connect REST API

s9.quote: MCP Server for interacting with Salesforce instances. @salesforce/mcp package on npm.
s9.title: salesforcecli/mcp - GitHub

s10.quote: Salesforce MCP Server for AI Agents. Managed auth, hosted MCP servers, and every Salesforce tool your agent needs. Free to start.
s10.title: Salesforce MCP Server - Composio

s11.quote: Salesforce DX MCP Server on GitHub – local MCP server with 60+ tools
s11.title: New in Salesforce Developer Edition: Agentforce Vibes IDE, Claude 4.5, MCP

s12.quote: Salesforce offers free trials for most CRM products ... No credit card required.
s12.title: CRM Free Trial: Start Salesforce for free

limitations: Some specific API call limits apply per org edition (e.g., Developer Edition: 15,000 API calls per 24-hour rolling period), but these are generous for development and testing.
API Access Control feature in production orgs can require admin approval for connected apps, but this does not affect the Developer Edition or the ability to build an agent toolkit.
The official Hosted MCP Servers feature may require a Salesforce org with appropriate licensing, but the DX MCP Server (open source) works with any org including the free Developer Edition.
